title: Breakdown review checks acceptance criteria for internal conflicts
description: EXEC-083's AC-1 (the Setup Skill no longer references execution-grill-with-docs) and AC-3 (reference the stamped CONTEXT-FORMAT.md by a path inside that skill's directory) contradicted each other on a strict reading and required a Team Lead ruling mid-gate to reconcile (recorded as the EXEC-083 AC-1/AC-3 read-together decision). Breakdown review should check an issue's acceptance criteria against each other for internal conflict before the issue is filed, so a contradiction surfaces at authoring rather than at the gate.
acceptance_criteria: Breakdown review includes a step that checks an issue's acceptance criteria for internal conflict before filing
A pair of criteria that cannot both hold on a strict reading is flagged at authoring
The check is documented where breakdown happens (execution-to-issues skill content or the breakdown-review step)
notes: Filed from the Sprint 7 retro (obs 2), 2026-06-12. Cites the EXEC-083 AC-1/AC-3 mid-gate ruling.
